task_completion.description: Agent logged into the Aerobridge Django admin panel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Django administration dashboard is visible, showing the user is logged in (e.g., 'Welcome, admin' or the main admin index).

task_completion.description: Agent navigated to the 'Add firmware' page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Add firmware' form is visible in the Django admin interface.

task_completion.description: Agent entered the correct binary URL and hash.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Binary file url' field contains 'https://firmware.dronecorp-avionics.example.com/releases/stable/v4.3.7/autopilot-stable-v4.3.7.bin' and the 'Binary file hash' field contains '3a7bd3e2360a3d29eea436fcfb7e44c735d117c42d1c1835420b6b9942dd4f1b'.

task_completion.description: Agent entered the correct version and manufacturer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Version' field contains '4.3.7' and the 'Manufacturer' field contains 'DroneCorp Avionics'.

task_completion.description: Agent entered the correct friendly name and set the firmware as active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Friendly name' field contains 'AutoPilot Stable Release v4.3.7' and the 'Is active' checkbox is checked.

task_completion.description: Agent successfully saved the new firmware record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A green success message indicating the firmware was added successfully is visible at the top of the Django admin page.

integrity.description: Agent used the Firefox web browser to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Firefox browser window is visible with the Django admin panel loaded, rather than terminal commands (like curl) or API testing tools.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual local application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows 'localhost:8000/admin/' or a subpath of it.

integrity.description: Agent submitted the form genuinely without bypassing the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the progressive filling out of the HTML form fields and clicking the 'Save' button, rather than just the final success screen appearing instantly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The firmware version 4.3.7 is verified as a real ArduPilot release version. The URL, hash, manufacturer, and friendly name are synthetic test data.
